About

Developer, builder, and systems-minded product engineer.

I’m Veer Thiara, a senior software engineer exploring AI systems, LangGraph, full-stack product development, and local-first architecture.

This site is where I document what I am building, how I am structuring the work, and the technical decisions behind each project.

View Projects LinkedIn
Current Focus Practical software with strong documentation

Projects here are meant to evolve from overview pages into deeper implementation notes over time.

Preferred Shape Product-first systems

I care more about building useful software clearly than adding complexity for its own sake.
